parameters.query: SELECT id, shippo_object_id, shippo_rate_id, status, sender_email, sender_name, sender_phone, from_address, to_address FROM demo_shipments WHERE id = {{ $json.shipmentId }} LIMIT 1;

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ rate: $json.rateId, label_file_type: 'PDF', async: false, metadata: 'shipment_' + $json.shipmentId }) }}

parameters.query: UPDATE demo_shipments SET status = 'label_purchased', tracking_number = '{{ $json.trackingNumber }}', label_url = '{{ $json.labelUrl }}', tracking_url = '{{ $json.trackingUrl }}', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = {{ $json.shipmentId }} RETURNING *;

INSERT INTO automation_logs (shipment_id, action_type, details, created_at) VALUES ({{ $json.id }}, 'label_purchased', '{"tracking_number": "{{ $('Parse Transaction').first().json.trackingNumber }}", "carrier": "{{ $('Parse Transaction').first().json.carrier }}"}'::jsonb, NOW());

INSERT INTO automation_logs (shipment_id, action_type, details, success, created_at) VALUES ({{ $('Build Airtable Data').first().json.orderShipmentId }}, 'airtable_synced', '{"contact_email": "{{ $('Build Airtable Data').first().json.contactEmail }}", "order_amount": {{ $('Build Airtable Data').first().json.orderAmount }}}'::jsonb, true, NOW());

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ firstName: $json.firstName, lastName: $json.lastName, email: $json.email, phone: $json.phone, locationId: $env.GHL_LOCATION_ID, tags: ['cargoflow-customer', 'label-purchased'], source: 'CargoFlow' }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO automation_logs (shipment_id, action_type, details, success, created_at) VALUES ({{ $('GHL - Build Contact Data').first().json.shipmentId }}, 'ghl_synced', '{"contact_id": "{{ $('GHL - Build Note Data').first().json.contactId }}", "email": "{{ $('GHL - Build Contact Data').first().json.email }}"}'::jsonb, true, NOW());
